body:
`Oceananigans.OutputReaders.FieldDataset` used to just be a `Dict{String,FieldTimeSeries}` but now it is a struct that also stores a dictionary metadata and a filepath.

This PR also adds some quality of life features to `Oceananigans.OutputReaders.FieldDataset`:
1. A list of metadata paths can be specified. Some scripts use `file["metadata"]` but others might use `file["parameters"]` (or potentially both).
2. A `grid` and `ArrayType` may be specified at the `FieldDataset` level which is then passed to `FieldTimeSeries` constructors.

Hoping to also bump the patch version along with this PR.
title: Quality of life improvements for `FieldDataset`
